description:
Configure Eclipse's Java Code Templates to enforce strict corporate coding standards. Update the 'Files' comment template to:
/*
 * Copyright (c) 2026 SecureBank Inc.
 * All rights reserved.
 * Confidential and Proprietary.
 */
Update the 'Types' comment template to:
/**
 * @author ${user}
 */
Create a new Java class named 'BankAccount' in package 'com.securebank.core' within the 'BankSystem' project, ensuring these templates are applied and the file is saved.
